title: stelis crystallina
intro: Stelis crystallina, also known as the Crystalline Stelis, is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stelis crystallina include the potential to treat various ailments such as fever, digestive issues, and skin conditions. Stelis crystallina can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and its extracts have also been used in herbal preparations to support immune function and reduce inflammation.
